All Bizarre Lineage Codes

Tired of grinding for Stand Arrows and Roka? We've got you covered. Here's the complete, up-to-date list of every working Bizarre Lineage code. We actively monitor lead dev MIDAS's Discord and the official Trello board so this page updates the second a new code drops.

Active & Upcoming Bizarre Lineage Codes

200KLIKES Stand Arrow & Rokakaka Awaiting Patch

* Developer MIDAS promised the 200KLIKES code will drop in the upcoming update. The redemption UI is currently disabled in-game. Be ready to redeem it the moment servers reboot!

How to Redeem Bizarre Lineage Codes

1

Launch Bizarre Lineage

Open Roblox and load into the Bizarre Lineage game world.

2

Open the Codes Menu

Tap the menu icon on the left side of your screen and select the codes tab.

3

Enter Your Code

Type or paste the Bizarre Lineage code exactly as shown and press Redeem.

4

Collect Rewards

Your free items — Stand Arrows, Cash, or EXP Boosts — will appear in your inventory instantly.

Where Do Bizarre Lineage Codes Come From?

If you're wondering who makes these codes, they are handed out directly by MIDAS and the official development team. The devs drop new codes to celebrate huge community milestones (like hitting massive Like goals on the Roblox page), whenever there's a big content patch, or even if servers slam and they need to hand out apology compensation.

Want to hunt for them yourself? The two best official sources are the Bizarre Lineage Discord Server and the official Trello board. But honestly, watching Discord announcements all day is exhausting. Just bookmark our page instead — we do the heavy lifting for you.

What Will Bizarre Lineage Codes Give?

🏹

Stand Arrow

Use to roll for a random Stand. Higher rarity Stands have lower drop rates.

🍈

Rokakaka Fruit

Reset your current Stand. Useful when you get a low-tier Stand from an Arrow.

💰

In-game Cash

Currency for buying items, Fighting Styles, and Sub-Abilities.

⚡

EXP Boost

Temporary boost to experience gain for faster leveling.

While You Wait for Bizarre Lineage Codes...

Make sure you are ready to use your rewards wisely. Check the tier list to know which Stand to keep, and browse our leveling guide to maximize your XP boosts.

Bizarre Lineage Tier List Browse All Stands Leveling Guide

Bizarre Lineage Codes FAQ

Are there any Bizarre Lineage codes working right now?

Currently, no. The game just launched and lead developer MIDAS is still finalizing the code redemption UI. However, MIDAS has promised the very first code will be '200KLIKES' once the game hits that milestone on the Roblox page.

How do I redeem my Bizarre Lineage codes?

Once the code patch drops, you'll open up the in-game menu (usually by tapping 'M' or the UI button on the left), click the 'Codes' tab (the Twitter bird icon), paste the code exactly as we have it below, and hit Redeem. We'll update this with exact screenshots the second it's live.

Where is the best place to find new Bizarre Lineage codes?

Right here! Alternatively, you can join the official Bizarre Lineage Discord server or check their official Trello board. We constantly scrape both of those sources to update this list so you don't have to.

Do Bizarre Lineage codes expire?

Absolutely. Roblox game codes constantly expire naturally after a few days or when a new major update drops. You've gotta be quick. Bookmark us to make sure you grab your Roka and Arrows before they vanish.

What do I get from Bizarre Lineage codes?

You can expect the usual essentials: free Stand Arrows (to roll for shiny Mythicals), Rokakaka Fruits (to reset your bad pulls), Cash for sub-abilities, and temporary EXP Boosts to help you grind up to max level faster.
